prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4880名→5036名→6238名→7021名→7040名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约2160名；2025年基准位次约7040名，较2024年仅小幅后移19名，显示位次趋于阶段性企稳；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2022年均为117人，2023年缩减至93人，2024年回升至120人，2025年微调至118人；2026年计划大幅增至133人，较2025年扩招约12.7%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海外国语大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第93名→2025年第82名→2026年第81名，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及空调费争议等一般性管理话题，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第49位，评价为较热，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档信号，报考心理相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，外国语言文学获评A+，为全国顶尖水平，与该校语言类办学定位高度一致，对有志于外语及相关交叉学科的考生具有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业2024年社会热度评估为一般观望，整体热度平稳偏冷，非当前报考热门赛道；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人大幅增长约35.4%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧；上海外国语大学位于上海市，为本市高校，在本市招生比例较高（2025年计划118人），本地考生报考意愿通常较强，地域偏好因素正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约12.7%、上海市考生总数激增约35.4%以及学校排名稳步提升等多重因素，扩招对竞争有一定缓解但考生规模扩张幅度更大，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年7040名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约7627名，区间7127–8127名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7127–8127名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业适度冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如接近7000名），可重点冲击英语、外交学、西班牙语等一档王牌专业；若位次接近区间上限（如8000名左右），建议以三档专业保底为主，争取二档中等专业。该校外国语言文学A+学科实力突出，语言类及相关交叉专业为报考核心方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shanghai were approximately 4880 → 5036 → 6238 → 7021 → 7040, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2160 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7040, only a slight backward shift of 19 positions compared to 2024, indicating a phase of stabilization; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects at this university in Shanghai was 117 in both 2021 and 2022, reduced to 93 in 2023, rebounded to 120 in 2024, and slightly adjusted to 118 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 133, an expansion of about 12.7% compared to 2025, which is a notable expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years, from 93rd in 2021 to 82nd in 2025 and 81st in 2026, reflecting enhanced overall strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving general management topics such as air conditioning fee disputes, with no major negative public opinion; it ranks 49th in overall Douyin popularity, rated as relatively hot, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms; there is no record of abnormal application drops for this university, indicating relatively stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Languages and Literature was rated A+, the top national level, highly consistent with the university's language-oriented positioning, strongly attracting candidates interested in foreign languages and related interdisciplinary fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity evaluation of foreign language majors is generally wait-and-see, with overall popularity stable but relatively cool, not a current hot track for applications; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shanghai college entrance examination is about 66,700, a significant increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, leading to intensified overall competition; Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, a local university with a relatively high enrollment proportion in the city (118 planned in 2025), and local candidates usually have strong willingness to apply, making the regional preference factor positive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 12.7% in 2026, the sharp increase of about 35.4% in the total number of candidates in Shanghai, and the steady rise in university rankings, the expansion alleviates competition to some extent, but the expansion of the candidate pool is larger. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 7040. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7627, with a range of 7127–8127.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7127–8127, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., close to 7000), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as English, Diplomacy, and Spanish; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 8000), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup and strive for moderate Tier 2 majors. The university's A+ discipline in Foreign Languages and Literature is outstanding, making language and related interdisciplinary majors the core direction for applications.
